data.title: AI filters possibly made NFT collections obsolete
data.description:
The ability to render old memes and images in multiple new cartoon styles may affect the NFT market. Artists now face competition from AI, capable of extending any NFT collection, or remastering a collection in a new style.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ai-filters-made-nft-collections-obsolete/

data.title: Bitget has launched WAL spot and contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget has launched WAL spot and contract transactions, with a leverage range of 1-20 times. Contract trading BOT will be synchronized.

data.title: Tether announces investment in Italian media BeWater
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino said in a post on X that Tether announced today its investment in Italian media BeWater.
BeWater leads Will Media and Chora Media, both of which are industry leaders in news, media, podcasts, events, and content creation for the Italian market.
Paolo Ardoino said: "In the media world, many companies are often forced to succumb to sponsor stories and politicized content in order to survive, and Tether's investment in BeWater will ensure that the group can remain solid, visionary and most importantly, an independent voice, fearless."

data.title: Bitget PoolX project IMT is now open for investment
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Bitget PoolX project Immortal Token (IMT) is now open for investment, with a total prize pool of 9,665,000 IMT. The lock-up channel deadline is 18:00 (UTC+8) on April 11, details are as follows:
BGB lock-up pool:
Total airdrop amount: 8,415,000 IMT
Personal lock-up limit: 8,000 BGB
IMT lock-up pool;
Total airdrop amount: 1,250,000 IMT
Personal lock-up limit: 12,500,000 IMT

source: https://zycrypto.com/massive-55-ripples-xrp-crash-could-be-coming-trader-peter-brandt-warns/

data.title: Swiss banking giant UBS warns of stagflation risk amid tariff dispute
data.description:
UBS Asia-Pacific President Iqbal Khan warns that stagflation is a major economic threat.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ubs-warns-of-stagflation-risk/

data.title: Opinion: PancakeSwap’s new “Create IDO” transaction is not a new coin IDO, but an optimization of Gas
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @canhua1023's analysis, the new "Create IDO" transaction created by the address that created the KiloEx IDO activity only optimized the Gas from 256 to 128, and it was not the launch of the CAKE new stock activity.

data.title: A whale unstaked 30,000 SOL and deposited it into Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale unstaked 30,000 SOL (worth $4.15 million) and 11.97 million USDC from Drift Protocol and deposited the above tokens into Binance. The whale's SOL holdings suffered a floating loss of $1.24 million.

data.title: LBank has launched GHIBLICZ U-margin perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the GHIBLICZ U-based perpetual contract at 17:35 (SGT) on March 27, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 20 times.

data.title: PancakeSwap Suspected to Launch New IDO Using CAKE
data.description:
Rumors on PancakeSwap's new coin IDO use CAKE, not BNB, causing speculation.
source: https://coincu.com/328833-pancakeswap-new-ido-rumors
